down_to_earth.title: Correct Placement Strategy
down_to_earth.principle: Place the red ball near the edge of the platform to maximize the impulse force on the green ball.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When pushing the green ball off the platform.

down_to_earth.title: Initial Velocity Consideration
down_to_earth.principle: Ensure the red ball imparts sufficient velocity to the green ball to push it off the platform.

down_to_earth.title: Diagonal Push Strategy
down_to_earth.principle: Use a diagonal push from below the green ball to effectively dislodge it off the platform.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When the green ball is positioned such that a direct push is insufficient.

down_to_earth.title: Gap Width Analysis
down_to_earth.principle: Analyze the available gaps on the platform to determine the optimal direction to push the green ball.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: Before placing the red ball to ensure the green ball falls into a gap.

down_to_earth.title: Platform Edge Geometry
down_to_earth.principle: Understand the geometry of the platform edges to ensure the green ball falls into the gap.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When placing the red ball to push the green ball off the platform.

down_to_earth.title: Optimal Ground Contact Duration
down_to_earth.principle: Ensure the green ball touches the purple ground for at least 3 seconds.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: After the green ball is pushed off the platform.

down_to_earth.title: Simulate Partial for Optimal Placement
down_to_earth.principle: Use simulate_partial to determine the best position for the red ball before finalizing the push.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: Before placing the red ball to test the push action.

down_to_earth.title: Push from Below with Height
down_to_earth.principle: Place the red ball below the green ball and push it off the platform to ensure it falls into a gap.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When the green ball is positioned above a gap.

down_to_earth.title: Avoid Overlapping Objects
down_to_earth.principle: Ensure the red ball does not overlap with the green ball or the platform during the push.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: Before and during the push action.

down_to_earth.description: Incorrectly placed the red ball outside the world bounds.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Agents may misinterpret the coordinate system or boundary conditions.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Always check the world bounds before placing objects.

down_to_earth.description: Failed to account for the green ball's velocity after being pushed off the platform.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Agents may not fully consider the dynamics of the push.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Simulate the push action to observe the resulting velocities.

down_to_earth.description: Incorrectly interpreted the gap analysis results.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Complex geometries can lead to misinterpretations.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Double-check the gap analysis before placing the red ball.

down_to_earth.description: Placed the red ball with an invalid radius.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Agents may not correctly set the radius when creating objects.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Verify the radius setting before executing actions.

down_to_earth.description: Red ball position too close to the green ball, causing overlap.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Agents may not maintain sufficient spacing between objects.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Ensure a safe distance between the red and green balls.
